question: Which national team does the player who scored Arsenal's goal in the 2026 Champions League final play for?

openrouter:anthropic/claude-sonnet-5.answer: Arsenal's goal in the 2026 Champions League final (PSG 1–1 Arsenal, PSG won 4-3 on penalties) was scored by **Kai Havertz**, who plays for the **Germany national team** ([NBC Sports](https://www.nbcsports.com/soccer/news/kai-havertz-scores-superb-goal-for-arsenal-in-champions-league-final-vs-psg); [Guardian live report](https://www.theguardian.com/football/live/2026/may/30/paris-saint-germain-arsenal-champions-league-final-live-psg-score-updates)).

openrouter:openai/gpt-5.6-sol.answer:
Kai Havertz scored Arsenal’s goal in the 2026 Champions League final. He plays for the **Germany national team**.

Sources: [NBC Sports](https://www.nbcsports.com/soccer/news/kai-havertz-scores-superb-goal-for-arsenal-in-champions-league-final-vs-psg) · [The Guardian](https://www.theguardian.com/football/2026/jun/24/kai-havertz-germany-world-cup-2026-interview)
